name: Quiet Pulse
description: Rhythmic pulse at the edge of perception

simple: rhythmic pulse at the very edge of perception
standard: rhythmic pulse at the very edge of perception
gentle volume swell and retreat like breathing glass
detailed: rhythmic pulse at the very edge of perception
gentle volume swell and retreat like breathing glass
subliminal rhythm maintaining presence without intrusion
ghost pulse keeping time in absolute quiet

instruments: pure sine tone at concert pitch
porcelain bowl struck with felt tip
